p.c: function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { spans(x0, x1, x0.gcd(x1)) }(a, b)

goal: exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { k0 * a + k1 * b = a.gcd(b) }

p.c: function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int) { exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { k0 * x0 + k1 * x1 = x2 } = spans(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, a.gcd(b))
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(u, a)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(v, b)
not exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * k0 + b * k1 }
function(x0: Int) { not exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * x0 + b * k0 } }(u)
function(x0: Int) { not exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * x0 + b * k0 } }(u)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { a * x0 + b * x1 != a.gcd(b) }(u, v)
(forall(x0: Int) { a * u + b * x0 != a.gcd(b) })
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { a * x0 + b * x1 != a.gcd(b) }(u, v)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { not x0.gcd(x1).is_negative }(a, b)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1) = x1.gcd(x0) }(b, a)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(b, a)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(a, b)
exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * k0 + b * k1 }
let w0: Int satisfy { exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * w0 + b * k0 } }
let w1: Int satisfy { a.gcd(b) = a * w0 + b * w1 }
(forall(x0: Int, x1: Int) { exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1) = x0 * k0 + x1 * k1 } })
let w2(arg0: Int, arg1: Int) -> w2_result: Int satisfy { exists(k1: Int) { arg0.gcd(arg1) = arg0 * w2_result + arg1 * k1 } }
(forall(x0: Int) { forall(x1: Int) { exists(k0: Int) { x0.gcd(x1) = x0 * w2(x0, x1) + x1 * k0 } } = true })
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x1) }(a, b)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0.gcd(x1).divides(x0) }(a, b)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { not x0.gcd(x1).is_negative }(a, b)
not exists(k0: Int) { not k0.is_negative and k0.divides(a) and k0.divides(b) and exists(k1: Int, k2: Int) { a * k1 + b * k2 = k0 } }
function(x0: Int) { not (not x0.is_negative and x0.divides(a) and x0.divides(b) and exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a * k0 + b * k1 = x0 }) }(a.gcd(b))
function(x0: Int) { not (not x0.is_negative and x0.divides(a) and x0.divides(b) and exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a * k0 + b * k1 = x0 }) }(a.gcd(b))
not (not a.gcd(b).is_negative and a.gcd(b).divides(a) and a.gcd(b).divides(b)) or not exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * k0 + b * k1 }
not exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * k0 + b * k1 } or not (not a.gcd(b).is_negative and a.gcd(b).divides(a)) or not a.gcd(b).divides(b)
(forall(x0: Int) { not exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * x0 + b * k0 } or not (not a.gcd(b).is_negative and a.gcd(b).divides(a)) or not a.gcd(b).divides(b) })
(forall(x0: Int, x1: Int) { not (not a.gcd(b).is_negative and a.gcd(b).divides(a)) or a * x0 + b * x1 != a.gcd(b) or not a.gcd(b).divides(b) })
(forall(x0: Int, x1: Int) { a * x0 + b * x1 != a.gcd(b) or not a.gcd(b).divides(b) or not a.gcd(b).divides(a) or a.gcd(b).is_negative })
(forall(x0: Int, x1: Int) { a * x0 + b * x1 != a.gcd(b) })
(forall(x0: Int) { not exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * x0 + b * k0 } or not a.gcd(b).divides(b) or not a.gcd(b).divides(a) or a.gcd(b).is_negative })
(forall(x0: Int) { not exists(k0: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * x0 + b * k0 } })
not exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { a.gcd(b) = a * k0 + b * k1 } or not a.gcd(b).divides(b) or not a.gcd(b).divides(a) or a.gcd(b).is_negative
